title: Getting Medicine at the Pharmacy 药房取药

lines.en: Hello. I need to pick up some medicine.
Can I see your prescription, please?
Here you go. The doctor said Tom has a cold.
lines.zh: 给你。医生说汤姆感冒了。

lines.en: OK. Here is the cough syrup and the fever medicine.
lines.zh: 好的。这是止咳糖浆和退烧药。

lines.en: The cough syrup: two spoons, three times a day.
lines.zh: 止咳糖浆：每次两勺，每天三次。

lines.en: One pill when his temperature is above thirty-eight degrees.
lines.zh: 体温超过三十八度时吃一片。

lines.en: Does he need to take it with food?
Yes, take it after meals. He will get well soon.
lines.zh: 是的，饭后吃。他很快就会好的。
